parsed_output.justification: Meryl provides highly contradictory claims throughout the discussion. She first claims to be the Troublemaker (Line 45), then claims to have seen the Troublemaker and a Werewolf in the center (Line 67), which is an action only the Seer can perform. She later attempts to explain this contradiction by admitting she is confused about whether she was the Seer or the Troublemaker (Line 89). Such blatant inconsistency in role claims is a strong indicator of a bluffing Werewolf.

Such blatant inconsistency in role claims is a strong indicator of a bluffing Werewolf.
